alert.title: Database overload — latency spike across services
alert.message: db-primary CPU at 95%, connection pool near saturation. Multiple services reporting elevated p99 latency and timeouts. Possible database or upstream issue.

logs: 2024-03-28 17:26:00 [WARN] Eviction rate elevated: 120 keys/sec (allkeys-lru policy)
2024-03-28 17:27:00 [WARN] Memory usage: 3.9GB / 4.0GB (97%) — nearing maxmemory limit
2024-03-28 17:27:30 [ERROR] OOM: cannot allocate 2.1MB for new key 'session:user:98234'
2024-03-28 17:27:31 [ERROR] OOM: write command rejected — maxmemory reached
2024-03-28 17:27:45 [ERROR] Background save (RDB) failed: Cannot allocate memory for fork()
2024-03-28 17:28:00 [ERROR] Repeated OOM errors — 847 write rejections in last 30s
2024-03-28 17:28:15 [ERROR] FATAL: Redis process killed by OOM killer (signal 9)
2024-03-28 17:28:15 [INFO] Shutdown: saving final RDB snapshot... FAILED (out of memory)
2024-03-28 17:28:20 [WARN] Sudden connection spike: 55 → 94 connections in 5 seconds
2024-03-28 17:28:25 [WARN] Slow query surge: 34 queries >1s detected in last 10s
2024-03-28 17:28:30 [WARN] CPU at 95% — unusually high for current time of day
2024-03-28 17:28:35 [WARN] Connection pool: 97/100 connections in use
2024-03-28 17:29:00 [ERROR] New connections refused: too many clients (max_connections=100)
2024-03-28 17:29:10 [WARN] Query queue building: 18 queries waiting for connection
2024-03-28 17:29:20 [INFO] Most frequent queries: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=?, SELECT * FROM sessions WHERE token=?
2024-03-28 17:29:30 [WARN] These queries are typically served from cache — cache miss rate may be elevated
2024-03-28 17:28:20 [WARN] Cache lookup failed for user profile: connection refused (cache-redis)
2024-03-28 17:28:21 [INFO] Falling back to database for user profile queries
2024-03-28 17:28:30 [WARN] Database response time 2.8s for GET /api/users/profile (normally <50ms with cache)
2024-03-28 17:28:45 [WARN] Session validation falling back to DB — 3.1s per lookup
2024-03-28 17:29:00 [ERROR] 35% of requests timing out at 5s limit
2024-03-28 17:29:10 [WARN] Health check degraded: response time 4.2s (threshold: 2s)
2024-03-28 17:28:25 [WARN] Cache miss for order #89123 inventory check — querying DB directly
2024-03-28 17:28:40 [WARN] Order processing latency 3.5s (SLO: 500ms)
2024-03-28 17:29:00 [ERROR] Order #89145 timed out waiting for DB connection
2024-03-28 17:29:10 [WARN] 28% of orders failing due to database timeouts
2024-03-28 17:29:20 [ERROR] Bulk order batch #4590 processing halted: cannot acquire DB connection
2024-03-28 17:28:30 [WARN] Upstream user-service response time exceeding SLO (p99 > 2000ms)
2024-03-28 17:28:45 [WARN] Upstream order-service response time exceeding SLO
2024-03-28 17:29:00 [WARN] 30% of API requests returning 504 Gateway Timeout
2024-03-28 17:29:15 [WARN] SLO breach: p99 latency 3800ms (target: 500ms) for 3 consecutive minutes
2024-03-28 17:29:30 [INFO] Rate limiting activated to protect backend services

root_cause.description: cache-redis exhausted its 4GB maxmemory limit and was killed by the OOM killer, forcing all services to fall back to direct database queries and overwhelming db-primary
